description: Configure GPredict for an upcoming ARISS school contact. Set up a ground station named 'Denver_School' (39.7312 N, 104.9674 W, 1609m) and a second ground station named 'Telebridge_Italy' (45.1333 N, 8.4500 E, 116m). Create a module named 'ARISS_Contact' to track ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044) using the 'Denver_School' ground station for predictions. Create another module named 'Other_Passes' to track AO-7 (7530), SO-50 (27607), AO-73 (39444), and AO-85 (40967), also using the 'Denver_School' ground station. Configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
